Metadata._purpose: SAMPLE file. The privilege-tier-classifier engine REGENERATES privilege-tier-catalog.locked.json from your live tenant on every run -- you do NOT hand-edit this file. This sample only documents the structure customers see in their generated catalog.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier0.Name: Administrators
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier0.Reason: Full control over the domain and ability to assign roles or reset credentials, enabling immediate full environment compromise.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier0.Name: Domain Admins
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier0.Reason: Full domain control enabling immediate full environment compromise.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier1.Name: Print Operators
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier1.Reason: Can manage printers and potentially escalate privileges via print spooler vulnerabilities or local admin rights on servers.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier1.Name: Backup Operators
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier1.Reason: Can back up and restore files including sensitive data and potentially escalate privileges via backup restoration or SeBackupPrivilege.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier2.Name: Hyper-V Administrators
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier2.Reason: Can manage Hyper-V hosts and VMs, enabling potential data or workload impact but no direct identity plane control.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier2.Name: Storage Replica Administrators
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier2.Reason: Can manage storage replication, impacting workloads but no direct identity plane control.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier3.Name: Users
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier3.Reason: Default group for standard users with no direct path to identity plane control or tenant takeover.

AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier3.Name: Guests
AD_BuiltInPermissionGroups_Tier3.Reason: Limited access group for guest accounts with no escalation path to identity plane control.

EntraID_BuiltInRoles_Tier0.Reason: Direct full tenant control including role assignments and identity plane permissions enabling immediate full environment compromise.
Has synchronization permissions that can be used to replicate credentials and control identity plane.

EntraID_BuiltInRoles_Tier1.Reason: Can reset passwords and invalidate refresh tokens for users including admins, enabling a reliable path to tenant takeover.
Can update organization info and billing settings, which can be leveraged in some escalation paths to tenant takeover.

EntraID_BuiltInRoles_Tier2.Reason: Can manage user accounts but no direct or reliable path to assign Global Administrator or control identity plane.
Can modify groups and applications but no direct path to assign Global Administrator or control identity plane.

EntraID_BuiltInRoles_Tier3.Reason: Read-only limited permissions with no path to identity plane control or tenant takeover.
Limited read permissions without any ability to modify identity or role assignments.

EntraID_CustomRoles_Tier3.Reason: Read-only access to users without ability to assign roles or reset credentials.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.DisplayName: Manage app permission grants and app role assignments
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to manage permission grants for application permissions to any API (including Microsoft Graph) and application assignments for any app, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Manage permission grants and app assignments for any app without signed-in user; direct role assignment control enabling full tenant takeover.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.DisplayName: Read and write all authentication method policies
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Description: Allows the app to read and write all authentication method policies for the tenant, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier0.Reason: Write access to authentication method policies allows resetting MFA and credential controls, enabling immediate full tenant compromise.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write API connectors for authentication flows
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to read, create and manage the API connectors used in user authentication flows, on behalf of the signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Manage API connectors in authentication flows, enabling modification of authentication which can lead to identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.DisplayName: Read and write to all app catalogs
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete apps in the app catalogs without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier1.Reason: Create, update, delete apps in app catalog without signed-in user; can modify app registrations enabling privilege escalation.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage all access reviews that user can access
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Can modify access reviews which may impact access governance but no direct path to identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.DisplayName: Manage access reviews for group and app memberships
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Description: Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings in the organization for group and app memberships, without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier2.Reason: Application-level access to modify group and app membership reviews; potential for data impact but no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier3.DisplayName: Read all access reviews that user can access
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier3.Description: Allows the app to read access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings that the signed-in user has access to in the organization.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier3.Reason: Read-only access to access reviews limited to signed-in user's scope; no direct identity plane control.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier3.Description: Allows an app to read all acronyms without a signed-in user.
EntraID_APIPermissions_Tier3.Reason: Read-only access to acronyms; no identity or security impact.

EntraID_APIPermissions_Catalog.Description: Allows the app to read access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings in the organization, without a signed-in user.
Allows the app to read, update, delete and perform actions on access reviews, reviewers, decisions and settings in the organization, without a signed-in user.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier0.Name: Owner
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier0.Reason: Full access including ability to assign roles in Azure RBAC, enabling immediate full tenant compromise.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier0.Name: User Access Administrator
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier0.Reason: Can manage user access to Azure resources including role assignments, enabling direct identity plane control.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier1.Name: Azure Kubernetes Service RBAC Writer
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier1.Reason: Access to secrets and ability to run pods as any ServiceAccount enables privilege escalation to cluster admin.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier1.Name: Security Admin
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier1.Reason: Can manage security policies and alerts, enabling reliable escalation to identity plane control via policy manipulation.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier2.Name: Contributor
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier2.Reason: Full resource management but cannot assign roles or modify identity plane objects; no direct path to tenant takeover.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier2.Name: HDInsight Domain Services Contributor
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier2.Reason: Can modify domain services related to HDInsight but no direct identity plane control or role assignment permissions.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier3.Name: AcrPush
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier3.Reason: Permissions limited to container registry push and pull; no identity plane or role assignment capabilities.

Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier3.Name: API Management Service Contributor
Azure_BuiltInRoles_Tier3.Reason: Can manage API services but lacks permissions to assign roles or modify identity plane objects.

Azure_Roles_Catalog.Name: API Management Service Contributor
Azure_Roles_Catalog.Description: Can manage service and the APIs
